findings.title: Add negative tests for URMA failover flag validation
findings.impact: The PR adds validators that reject non-finite or out-of-range success ratios and zero min-sample counts, but the new UT/ST only exercise valid values. A regression that accidentally accepts NaN, values above 1.0, negative ratios, or min_sample_count=0 would not fail any test, leaving the new operator-facing config surface unguarded.
findings.fix: Add focused flag-validation tests, for example in the existing flags/validator test area, that attempt to set urma_failover_success_rate_ratio to -0.1, 1.1, and NaN/inf, and urma_failover_min_sample_count to 0, then assert SetCommandLineOption/validation fails and the previous flag value remains unchanged.
